_comment: Seed IP ranges per app ID for VPN split-tunnel routing. These CDN ranges are a best-effort snapshot and may drift over time; use tools/discover-ranges.js to refresh them. Contributions welcome.

com.peacocktv.peacockandroid.name: Peacock
com.peacocktv.peacockandroid.notes: Comcast / NBCUniversal CDN. These are a representative seed list, not exhaustive. Verify with tools/discover-ranges.js while streaming.

com.netflix.ninja.name: Netflix
com.netflix.ninja.notes: Netflix Open Connect primarily; many ISPs host appliances so ranges vary by region. Disabled by default.

youtube.leanback.v4.name: YouTube
youtube.leanback.v4.notes: Google / YouTube CDN. Very broad range; consider whether VPN-routing YouTube is actually desirable.
